steps.expected: Studio page loads with right panel
steps.observed: Studio page loaded with Gallery, Nodes, Generate tabs in right panel

steps.action: Click Generate tab in right panel
steps.expected: Workflow Generator tab opens with textarea and examples
steps.observed: Workflow Generator tab opened with starter workflows and textarea

steps.expected: Contextual autocomplete dropdown appears with matching suggestions
steps.observed: Autocomplete dropdown appeared with 'SUGGESTIONS' header showing: Video production pipeline, Add a video generation node, Product showcase workflow, Trim and process video

steps.expected: Suggestion prompt text inserted into textarea
steps.observed: Text 'Generate a video production workflow' was inserted into the textarea and autocomplete closed

steps.action: Click Workflow settings gear icon in Generate tab
steps.expected: Pop-out settings menu opens with generation configuration options
steps.observed: Settings menu opened showing: Default Model (Auto/Fast/Quality/Premium), Output Resolution (1K/2K/4K), Workflow Complexity (Simple/Standard/Advanced)
Settings menu closed, gear icon returned to normal state

steps.action: Reopen settings menu, then click outside (on Studio header button)
steps.expected: Settings menu closes on outside click
steps.observed: Settings menu closed after clicking outside on the Studio button

steps.action: Type 'Generate a video production workflow' into textarea (via autocomplete)
steps.observed: Prompt 'Generate a video production workflow' populated in textarea

steps.expected: Workflow generation triggered, nodes appear on canvas
steps.observed: 3 nodes generated on canvas: INTRO SCENE (Text node), SCRIPT WRITING (Image node with script text), OFFICE SCENE (Video T2V node). Queue indicator shows '3 queued'

steps.expected: Nodes are valid, connected, and contain contextual content
steps.observed: All 3 nodes have contextual prompts (cinematic cityscape video, promotional script, dolly office shot), proper types (TEXT, Image, 16:9 T2V), and QUEUED status badges. Nodes are laid out in connected configuration.

steps.expected: Nodes attempt execution (may fail due to missing API keys)
steps.observed: Nodes remain in QUEUED state — expected behavior as fal.ai API keys are not available locally. No console errors.

evidence.network: POST to generate-workflow edge function succeeded (nodes returned). Node execution queued but fal.ai keys not available locally.

frictions.description: The initial page load shows a loading screen for several seconds before the home page renders — had to wait ~5s after navigation.
frictions.resolution: Added 5s wait after initial navigation to /home

frictions.description: The bottom prompt bar (separate from the Generate tab textarea) already had 'gen' typed from earlier exploration, which persisted throughout the session
frictions.resolution: Did not affect testing — the Generate tab textarea is a separate input

frictions.description: Clicking on the canvas area (mouse move + click at coordinates) did not close the settings menu — had to click on a specific UI element outside the menu
frictions.resolution: The mousedown handler on the canvas may be intercepted by ReactFlow. Clicking the Studio header button successfully triggered outside-click close.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-STUDIO-013 (Contextual Autocomplete) shows a dropdown with filtered suggestions when typing in the Generate tab textarea, and selecting a suggestion correctly inserts the prompt text. VAL-STUDIO-014 (Pop-Out Settings Menu) opens with Quality, Resolution, and Complexity options, closes on Escape and outside click. VAL-STUDIO-015 (Prompt-to-Workflow) successfully generated a 3-node video production workflow (INTRO SCENE, SCRIPT WRITING, OFFICE SCENE) with contextual prompts from a natural language description.
